caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I DON'T DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that looks like a clothing store or studio, with white mannequins wearing white shirts, clothing racks, and framed photographs hanging on the white wall behind him. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black logo containing the text "SOT" and a red logo that says "DON'T REALLY FIT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the background and surrounding equipment remain constant.
